Tower defenses upgraded and existing siege refreshed.
Towers are good targets for a force that isn't large enough to take on a keep.
Towers can be upgraded to have pots of oil, cannons, or mortars, so be careful approaching one.
Towers have their own set of walls and a heavy gate protecting the entrance.
